description:
Spark is an idea-sharing platform. Browse a feed of app and project ideas, upvote the ones you love, discuss them in comments, and post your own sparks. Organize concepts into idea bases and watch the best ideas rise with Hot and New sorting.

Features:
- Feed of community ideas with Hot and New sorting
- Upvote and downvote to surface the best concepts
- Post your own ideas in seconds
- Idea bases to organize related concepts
- Category filters: productivity, finance, health, sustainability, and more
- Fast native macOS app with widgets
